headline: A. O. Smith (AOS) Stock Gets Fair Value Trim As Analysts Cut Targets
summary: A. O. Smith’s modeled fair value has been trimmed slightly from US$70.91 to US$70.45 per share, pointing to a modest reset in the price target rather than a wholesale rethink of the story. This change lines up with recent mixed analyst commentary, where firms acknowledge pressure on near term growth while still pointing to elements such as demand resilience, cost actions, and balance sheet flexibility as potential supports. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces fit together and...
